name: Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual revenue recognition causes cash flow gaps. We automate report generation instead of manual spreadsheets and accounting software.
problem_solved: Manual revenue recognition processes lead to delays in financial reporting.
features: Data import functionality for sales orders

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual revenue recognition processes lead to delays in financial reporting.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual revenue recognition causes cash flow gaps. We automate report generation instead of manual spreadsheets and accounting software.
must_have_features: Data import functionality for sales orders
